text.autoconfig.lepidoptera/config.optio: Size, yaw, n' location o' th' Bottle o' th' Chemist on yer noggin

Changes where ye stash yer Bottle o' th' Chemist
on yer head.

Ye can't affect how ye stash yer Bottle o' th'
Chemist if its in yer main hat slot with this
tweak.
Show th' Bottle o' th' Chemist on yer noggin

If ye turn this off, th' Bottle o' th' Chemist
won't show if it's in yer booty hat slot.

Ye can't affect whether th' Bottle shows in yer
main hat slot with this tweak.
Put the Bottle o' the Chemist on yer head right quick with Shift-Click

If this be changin' in yer config file, the seas
update it.
Yer ship receives this value when ye set sail on the seas.
[Demo] Size o' yer stores

[Demo] This only be here t'show off the abilities
o' this here widget.
Config file format: WxH (e.g. 9x3).
Max width: 9, max height: 4.
[Demo] Bite o' yer tools
Let ye be craftin' the Bottle o' the Chemist

If ye be changing this, ye be havin' to drop
anchor before ye set sail again, or ye can use
/reload.

Yer ship receives this value when ye set sail on
the seas.
Bottle o' the Chemist can be summoned by pirate captains

Whether the Bottle o' the Chemist will show in
the Pirate Captain's inventory.

§eIf ye be changin' this, ye need to leave the seas§r
§eentirely before settin' sail again.§r
